zh.Dunster, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.Dunster, Somersetshire Co., England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Mohun於大約1156年4月出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親William de Mohun27歲，母親Goda de Toni14歲。他於大約1182年與Lucy de Cambridge在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1193年10月在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Mohun于大约1156年4月出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲William de Mohun27岁，母亲Goda de Toni14岁。他于大约1182年与Lucy de Cambridge在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1193年10月在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Mohun was born about April 1156, in Dunster, Somerset, England, his father, William de Mohun, was 27 and his mother, Goda de Toni, was 14. He married Lucy de Cambridge about 1182, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in October 1193, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Mohun est né environ avril 1156, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William de Mohun, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Goda de Toni, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Lucy de Cambridge environ 1182, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en octobre 1193, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Mohun um April 1156 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Mohun 27 und seine Mutter Goda de Toni 14. Er hat um 1182 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Lucy de Cambridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb im Oktober 1193 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun è nato il circa aprile 1156 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, il suo padre, William de Mohun, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Goda de Toni, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Lucy de Cambridge circa 1182, nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel ottobre 1193, nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Mohunが約1156年4月にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父William de Mohunは27歳，母Goda de Toniは14歳であった。約1182年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターでLucy de Cambridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1193年10月にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Mohun(이)가 대략 1156년 4월 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Mohun(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Goda de Toni(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 Lucy de Cambridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1193년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun nasceu aproximadamente abril de 1156, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Mohun, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Goda de Toni, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy de Cambridge aproximadamente 1182, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1193, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Mohun родился около апрель 1156 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Mohun было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Goda de Toni, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy de Cambridge около 1182 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер октябрь 1193 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Mohun nació aproximadamente abril de 1156, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Mohun, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Goda de Toni, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Lucy de Cambridge aproximadamente 1182, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en octubre de 1193, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
